message:
feat(fusion): refactor queue drain API and extend searcher pipeline

queue.rs: extract `drain_with_limit(limit)` as the shared
implementation, then rebuild `drain_batch()` on top of it and add
`drain_batch_up_to(limit)` for consumers that need explicit caps on
work-in-flight without re-enqueuing already-fetched jobs.

refresh.rs: update refresh cycle to use the new drain API, clarifying
the `max_docs_per_cycle` boundary.

searcher.rs: extend the fusion searcher with unicode-normalization
support (new `unicode-normalization` workspace dependency in Cargo.toml)
and additional query pipeline enrichments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
